practice.name: Problem 9 (2023 AMC 10B)
practice.statement: The numbers $16$ and $25$ are a pair of consecutive positive squares whose difference is $9$. How many pairs of consecutive positive perfect squares have a difference of less than or equal to $2023$?

practice.name: Problem 11 (2024 AMC 10A)
practice.statement: How many ordered pairs of integers $(m, n)$ satisfy $\sqrt{n^2 - 49} = m$?

practice.name: Problem 15 (2024 AMC 10A)
practice.statement: Let $M$ be the greatest integer such that both $M+1213$ and $M+3773$ are perfect squares. What is the units digit of $M$?
